topicArea: USCIS forms, immigration filing errors, RFEs (Requests for Evidence), USCIS processing times, edition date checks, USCIS rejections

audienceLevel: non-lawyer with very high stakes (immigration status)

originalSignalOptions: Specific USCIS Policy Manual citation with volume/part/chapter (e.g., USCIS Policy Manual Vol. 7, Part A, Ch. 5)
Comparison table of edition date acceptance windows for major forms
Decision tree (e.g., 'Paper file vs. online file: which is right for me?')

Glossary of confusing immigration terms (priority date vs. filing date, RFE vs. NOID, denial vs. rejection)

byline: By the FormGuard immigration filing team
aboutFooter: About FormGuard: We help immigrants and sponsors check USCIS forms for filing errors before submission. We publish guides on USCIS forms, edition dates, RFEs, and processing times, updated as USCIS policy changes.
ctaText: Check your USCIS form for filing errors
